name: @ai-sdk/black-forest-labs
description: The **[Black Forest Labs provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/black-forest-labs)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) adds image model support for the [Black Forest Labs API](https://docs.bfl.ai/).
